item.title: Federal Judge Invokes '1984' While Ordering Trump Administration to Restore Slavery Exhibit in Philadelphia Park
item.description: National Park Service workers were seen dismantling a memorial to enslaved people at The President’s House in January

item.title: Inside Ralph Lauren's Fall 2026 Show: Timeless Glamour, a 'Renegade Spirit' and Anne Hathaway's 'Cinderella Moment' (Exclusive)
item.description: Kicking off New York Fashion Week, Ralph Lauren unveiled a collection rooted in adventure and reinvention in front of celebrity guests including Anne ...

item.title: Robert Duvall, Oscar Winner and Star of “The Godfather” and “Apocalypse Now”, Dies at 95
item.description: Duvall's acting career spanned seven decades

item.title: Robert Irwin Declares Himself ‘Khaki Sally’ After Joining Role Model on Stage at Australia Show
item.description: The 22-year-old son of Steve Irwin won season 34 of 'Dancing With The Stars' in December 2025

item.title: Apple Martin Reveals Her Post-College Plans After Dropping Her Law School Aspirations
item.description: The 21-year-old daughter of Gwyneth Paltrow and Chris Martin previously said she wanted to go to law school after college graduation
